# Summary

Briefly describe the changes and their purpose.

## TDD Checklist

- [ ] Red commit: failing test added
- [ ] Green commit: minimum code to pass test
- [ ] Refactor commit (optional): improve with tests still green
- [ ] Coverage ≥80% on touched packages (CI enforces this)
- [ ] `go vet ./...` clean
- [ ] `gofmt` clean

## Test Plan

Describe how to manually verify these changes work as intended.
